# Strike SCF — llms.txt
# https://www.strikescf.com

Strike SCF is the decisioning and liquidity orchestration layer for resilient global supply chains.

## What Strike SCF does

Strike connects supplier risk, operational signals, and embedded finance into one intelligent system. The platform actively determines where capital and action are needed — then routes financing, surfaces risks, and recommends executable decisions.

## Products

- Reverse Factoring: buyer-led supply chain finance using anchor credit to fund the supplier base
- Invoice Factoring: supplier-initiated receivables finance against approved invoices
- Purchase Order Financing: pre-shipment financing for suppliers with confirmed purchase orders
- Dynamic Discounting: anchor-funded early payment programs using buyer's own balance sheet

## Who it's for

- Banks: originate and underwrite SCF programs with AI-scored counterparties and full audit trails
- Anchor Corporates: protect supplier continuity, optimize working capital, route financing to critical suppliers
- Suppliers: access early payment against approved invoices within hours

## Platform

- AI layer: Claude (Anthropic) for risk scoring, co-pilot, inline insights, and regulatory document generation
- Supply Graph: live network of bank → program → anchor → supplier relationships with risk-colored nodes
- KYB: full Know Your Business onboarding with three modes (standard, known, custom)
- Security: multi-tenant PostgreSQL with Row Level Security, JWT auth, no client-side API keys

## Contact

Platform: https://app.strikescf.com
Corporate site: https://www.strikescf.com
Contact: https://www.strikescf.com/contact
